title: MC Racing pack
description: official modpack of the mcdonalds ice boat racing team
body:
MCRacing Ice Boat Racing Modpack

This modpack is purpose-built for competitive Minecraft ice boat racing and includes essential tools and visual enhancements used by most professional racers. It is fully compatible with the standards of major racing leagues and adheres to the rules outlined in most official ice boat racing rulebooks.

Key Included Mods:
- BoatCam – Enhances the racing experience with a smoother, more dynamic third-person camera.
- BoatHud – Provides critical real-time information.
- Racing Scoreboard – Displays race positions, pit counts, and other in-race data.
- OpenBoatUtils – Allows users to go up blocks.

This modpack is adheres to the competitive standard in many leagues and communities, providing everything racers need to practice, compete, and improve their performance.

Whether you're new to the scene or an experienced racer, this pack gives you the tools used by top drivers in the world of Minecraft ice boat racing.
